meaning: n.不能透过的性质,不渗透性
examples: The detecting results show that concrete has no cracks and has excellent impermeability.
The compactness of concrete is an important factor that affects concrete's durability and impermeability.
Tung oil was also used in the shipbuilding to improve the caking property and impermeability of the watercraft.
Genta again produced a robust design that suggested the impermeability of a ship's porthole, while exhibiting constructional details worthy of fine jewelry.
